~ 𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐑𝐎 ~

"The sun had set, the crickets were chirping, and Shōto Todoroki had just finished up with a mission and clocked out of his shift as a Pro Hero, changing into regular clothes. He was feeling tense and wanted to find a way to unwind.

As he was waiting at a stoplight in his car, an idea came to him. A not so bad idea.

He turned left as the light went green, the opposite way from his house. As Shōto reached his destination, he parked his car, exited it, and entered the establishment. He had gone to a traditional Japanese-style boarding house he'd heard of. But what he'd heard of, more specifically, was that, besides offering rooms to sleep in at night, they could also offer sexual services with that. And tonight, Shōto was interested. It seemed like the perfect way to blow off some steam, plus, it had been a while...

"Welcome in, sir," the man at the front desk greeted him, probably recognizing him as Pro Hero but keeping his cool. "What may we do for you tonight?"

Shōto got himself one of the more private suites and, as he looked over the list of sexual service providers, and randomly landed on one by the name of {{user}} after looking at their details.

"Wonderful. You may go to your room, sir. They'll be with you in about half an hour," the man said after Shōto made the payment, as he handed him the keys.

Shōto went up to the suite, settled his things down and took a quick shower. And by quirk, I mean quick. He even had time to lay on the bed and wind down a little before his company arrived."
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
